title: Tala 23cm Siliconised Greaseproof Circles for Liner Baking Tins and Trays, Prevents Sticking and Supports Quick and Easy Release on All Baked Products, Pack of 20 with 23cm / 9inch Diameter
features: LARGE PACK: Pack of 20 siliconized 23cm baking liners, these liners will ensure your fresh baked items release from your cake tin without sticking or damaging your bake
QUICK & EASY: These Greaseproof Circles measure 23cm wide which mean they can line all cake tins up to this measurement
HEALTHY OPTION: Using these Tala Loaf Tins Liners remove the need to grease the pan therefore a healthy option for your bakes
REUSABLE: These liners are long-lasting and can be wiped down and re used. They are also microwave and oven safe.

TALA: The Tala collection of Kitchen gadgets and utensils includes a diverse which is perfect for everyday cooking and baking, established in 1899, Tala has become a trusted source of high-quality Kitchenware, Bakeware and Cookware
FSC Liners: FSC certified liners. The FSC mark guarantees a sustainable supply chain, with silicone from responsibly managed forests
description: Product Description Pack of 40 siliconized 23cm baking liners, these liners will ensure your fresh baked items release from your cake tin without sticking or damaging your bake. Circles measure 23cm wide which mean they can line all cake tins up to this measurement, can be wiped clean and reused. The healthier option - ditch the butter and grease. These liners also help to hold moisture into your bakes. Manufactured in England using the best possible production methods. Box Contains 20x 23 cm Siliconised Greaseproof Circle
